name: EURING Code 2020
description: Current EURING code version with pipe-delimited format and decimal coordinates

field_definitions.name: ringing scheme
field_definitions.description: Ringing schemes are here defined as centres issuing rings with alphanumeric ring number with specific address

field_definitions.name: primary identification method
field_definitions.description: Is to denote the primary method used to identify a bird

field_definitions.name: identification number
field_definitions.description: A sequence of ten characters, to be coded directly

field_definitions.name: verification of the metal ring
field_definitions.description: Ring verification may be by the ring being sent or a photograph, photocopy, rubbing or carbon copy being available

field_definitions.name: metal ring information
field_definitions.description: Informations about metal ring

field_definitions.name: other marks information
field_definitions.description: This gives information about any other marks associated with the bird

field_definitions.name: species mentioned
field_definitions.description: Species as reported by the finder, whether or not he has correctly identified the species

field_definitions.name: species concluded
field_definitions.description:
Species as concluded by the Scheme.
The importance of this filed is to confirm if the Scheme considers the species, given by the person who handled the bird, is correct or not
evolution_notes: Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-04-17T17:29:59.064Z

field_definitions.name: manipulated
field_definitions.description: The options are presented in order with the most important first

field_definitions.name: moved before the encounter
field_definitions.description: The movement indicated is that which has happened before the encounter

field_definitions.name: catching method
field_definitions.description: Catching method typology

field_definitions.name: catching lures
field_definitions.description: Catching lures used

field_definitions.name: sex mentioned
field_definitions.description: Sex as mentioned by the person who handled the bird

field_definitions.name: sex concluded
field_definitions.description: Sex as concluded by the Scheme

field_definitions.name: age mentioned
field_definitions.description: Age as mentioned by the person who handled the bird

field_definitions.name: age concluded
field_definitions.description: Age as concluded by the Scheme

field_definitions.name: status
field_definitions.description: Status of full grown bird

field_definitions.name: brood size
field_definitions.description:
-- bird is not a nestling
00 unknown, not coded
nn n chicks in the nest
evolution_notes: Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-05-04T17:38:54.473Z

field_definitions.name: pullus age
field_definitions.description: -- bird is not a pullus 99 pullus age not recorded 00 pullus age 0 days nn pullus age n days
evolution_notes: Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-05-04T17:42:50.087Z

field_definitions.name: accuracy of pullus age
field_definitions.description: - bird is not a pullus 0 accurate to the day n accurate to within n days either side of day coded
evolution_notes: Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-05-04T17:44:15.820Z

field_definitions.name: date
field_definitions.description: The date in days, months and years to be coded

field_definitions.name: accuracy of date
field_definitions.description: Date accurato to within...
evolution_notes: Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-05-04T17:47:12.854Z

field_definitions.name: time
field_definitions.description: The actual time of the day in hours and minutes, according to a 24 hour clock in local time
evolution_notes: Manual edit: Edit via PositionalMatrixEditor at 2026-05-04T17:54:20.733Z

field_definitions.name: place code
field_definitions.description:
The first pair of characters identifies the country (always alphabetic)
The second pair of characters identifies the sub-division of the country (either alphabetic or numeric)

field_definitions.name: geographical co-ordinates
field_definitions.description:
ABBCCDDWXXXYYZZ representing:
latitude A (+ is hemisphere North, - is South)
            BB (degrees from 0 to 90)
            CC (minutes from 0 to 59)
            DD (seconds from 0 to 59)
longitude W (+ is hemisphere East, - is West)
            XXX (degrees from 0 to 180)
            YY (minutes from 0 to 59)
            ZZ (seconds from 0 to 59)

field_definitions.name: accuracy of co-ordinates
field_definitions.description: Numeric scale for old definitions, alphabetic scale for more precise definitions

field_definitions.name: condition
field_definitions.description: Conditions of the bird when found

field_definitions.name: circumstances
field_definitions.description: Circumstances of the encounter. The first digit is referred to as the primary division

field_definitions.name: circumstances presumed
field_definitions.description:
Boolean: 0 no doubt about the circumstances
               1 circumstances presumed

field_definitions.name: EURING code identifier
field_definitions.description: This field show the history of the record

field_definitions.name: distance
field_definitions.description: Calculated by computer as the distance between the current record and the ringing data (loxodrome method preferred)

field_definitions.name: direction
field_definitions.description: Calculated by computer as the direction to the current record from the ringing data (given in degrees 000-359)

field_definitions.name: elapsed time
field_definitions.description: Calculated by computer as the elapsed time between the current record and ringing data (given in days)

field_definitions.name: wing length
field_definitions.description: This is the maximum chord measurement, as described by Svewnsson (1992)

field_definitions.name: third primary
field_definitions.description: Length of the third primary feather (mm) to a maximum precision of 0.5 mm

field_definitions.name: state of wing point
field_definitions.description: The condition of the longest primary feather

field_definitions.name: mass
field_definitions.description: In grams, measured to a maximum precision of 0.1 g

field_definitions.name: moult
field_definitions.description: A single letter code for main, clearly identifiable moult states

field_definitions.name: plumage code
field_definitions.description: For extra information to enhance age code

field_definitions.name: hind claw
field_definitions.description: In millimetres, to a maximum precision of 0,1 mm

field_definitions.name: bill length
field_definitions.description: In millimetres, to a maximum precision of 0,1 mm

field_definitions.name: bill method
field_definitions.description: This field is mandatory if the Bill Length is given

field_definitions.name: total head length
field_definitions.description: In millimetres, to a maximum precision of 0,1 mm

field_definitions.name: tarsus
field_definitions.description: In millimetres, to a maximum precision of 0,1 mm

field_definitions.name: tarsus method
field_definitions.description: This field is mandatory if the Tarsus is given

field_definitions.name: tail length
field_definitions.description: In millimetres, to a maximum precision of 0,1 mm

field_definitions.name: tail difference
field_definitions.description: The difference in length between longest and shortest feathers measured along the axis of the tail with the tail closed

field_definitions.name: fat score
field_definitions.description:
Codes are defined fot three nethods of assessing fat:
B - Biometrics Working Group
E - ESF system
P - Operation Baltic

field_definitions.name: fat score method
field_definitions.description: One character code to indicate fat score method used (B, E, P)

validation_rules.error_message: Species code must be exactly 5 digits

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 8 and value[:3].isalpha() and value[3:].isdigit() and value[:3].isupper()
validation_rules.error_message: Ring number must be 3 uppercase letters followed by 5 digits
Age code must be a single digit from 1-9
Sex code must be a single digit from 1-9

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 8 and value.isdigit() and 1 <= int(value[6:8]) <= 31 and 1 <= int(value[4:6]) <= 12 and int(value[:4]) >= 1900
validation_rules.error_message: Date must be 8 digits in valid YYYYMMDD format

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 4 and value.isdigit() and int(value[:2]) <= 23 and int(value[2:]) <= 59
validation_rules.error_message: Time must be 4 digits in valid HHMM format (00:00-23:59)
Latitude must be between -90 and 90 degrees
Longitude must be between -180 and 180 degrees
Metal ring info must be a single digit
Other marks info must be exactly 5 digits
Method code must be exactly 2 digits
Accuracy code must be exactly 2 digits
Wing length must be a positive decimal less than 1000mm
Weight must be a positive decimal less than 10000g
